{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set activeNavigation = "View licences" %} {% set licence = data['licences'][data.ID] %} {% set pageName="Abstraction details"%} {% block containerStart %} {{ govukBackLink({ text: "Back to licence", href: "/external/licence" }) }} {% endblock %} {% block content %}
Abstraction licence {{ licence.number }}

{{ pageName }}

{% for use in licence.use %}

{{ use.purpose }}

{{ govukSummaryList({ classes: "govuk-!-margin-bottom-7", rows: [ { key: { text: "Abstraction point" }, value: { html: use.points | join('
') } }, { key: { text: "Period of abstraction" }, value: { html: "From " + use.periodStart | mmddToDate + " to " + use.periodEnd | mmddToDate } }, { key: { text: "Abstraction amount" }, value: { html: use.amount + " " + (use.units | unitsToWords) } } ] }) }} {% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
